description: The GesturePhaseSegmentationProcessed dataset is sourced from the UCI Machine Learning Repository and is designed for studying Gesture Phase Segmentation. It consists of features extracted from seven videos of people gesticulating. The dataset includes both raw and processed files, with the processed files containing 32 numeric attributes and a class attribute. The dataset is intended for classification tasks, particularly in the domain of gesture analysis and segmentation. The processed data captures vectorial velocity and acceleration of hands and wrists, as well as scalar velocities, with the target being the gesture phase, which can be one of five classes: rest position, preparation, stroke, hold, and retraction.

attribute_introduction.X1: Vectorial velocity of left hand (x coordinate).
attribute_introduction.X2: Vectorial velocity of left hand (y coordinate).
attribute_introduction.X3: Vectorial velocity of left hand (z coordinate).
attribute_introduction.X4: Vectorial velocity of right hand (x coordinate).
attribute_introduction.X5: Vectorial velocity of right hand (y coordinate).
attribute_introduction.X6: Vectorial velocity of right hand (z coordinate).
attribute_introduction.X7: Vectorial velocity of left wrist (x coordinate).
attribute_introduction.X8: Vectorial velocity of left wrist (y coordinate).
attribute_introduction.X9: Vectorial velocity of left wrist (z coordinate).
attribute_introduction.X10: Vectorial velocity of right wrist (x coordinate).
attribute_introduction.X11: Vectorial velocity of right wrist (y coordinate).
attribute_introduction.X12: Vectorial velocity of right wrist (z coordinate).
attribute_introduction.X13: Vectorial acceleration of left hand (x coordinate).
attribute_introduction.X14: Vectorial acceleration of left hand (y coordinate).
attribute_introduction.X15: Vectorial acceleration of left hand (z coordinate).
attribute_introduction.X16: Vectorial acceleration of right hand (x coordinate).
attribute_introduction.X17: Vectorial acceleration of right hand (y coordinate).
attribute_introduction.X18: Vectorial acceleration of right hand (z coordinate).
attribute_introduction.X19: Vectorial acceleration of left wrist (x coordinate).
attribute_introduction.X20: Vectorial acceleration of left wrist (y coordinate).
attribute_introduction.X21: Vectorial acceleration of left wrist (z coordinate).
attribute_introduction.X22: Vectorial acceleration of right wrist (x coordinate).
attribute_introduction.X23: Vectorial acceleration of right wrist (y coordinate).
attribute_introduction.X24: Vectorial acceleration of right wrist (z coordinate).
attribute_introduction.Phase: The gesture phase, which can be one of the following: D (rest position), P (preparation), S (stroke), H (hold), R (retraction).
